title: Provider reconciliation record
description: The immutable record reconciling NABCor's local smoke accounting against provider-visible usage (DEC-0020). It binds the smoke result and records the Product Owner's console observations (one request visible, model, usage, cost/delta, hard cap still active) and the reconciliation verdict. reconciled is true ONLY when exactly one request was observed, the returned model matched, usage agreed where the console exposes it, the local cost is within USD 0.01 of the provider-visible amount OR a per-request precision limitation is explicitly documented, the charge is no greater than USD 0.25, and the USD 60 hard cap remains active. Carries no credential or sensitive billing detail.

requests_observed.description: number of matching requests the Product Owner observed in the provider console window; reconciliation requires exactly 1

provider_input_tokens.description: provider-visible input tokens where the console exposes them; null when unavailable

provider_usd.description: provider-visible cost or usage delta where available; null when the console lacks per-request precision

usd_within_tolerance.description: local settled cost is within USD 0.01 of provider_usd; may be true-by-limitation only when precision_limitation is true and provider_usd is null (semantic layer)

precision_limitation.description: true when the console exposes insufficient per-request precision to compare cost exactly; the record documents this rather than claiming a false match

reconciled.description: the overall reconciliation verdict; the semantic layer enforces that true requires exactly one observed request, model match, within-tolerance (or documented limitation), charge <= 0.25, and the hard cap active

product_owner_confirmation.description: the Product Owner's written console-observation confirmation; carries no credential or sensitive billing detail

examples.product_owner_confirmation: Console shows exactly one Haiku request in the matching UTC window; usage 40 in / 12 out; monthly hard cap remains USD 60 and active.
examples.notes: Synthetic smoke reconciliation; console per-request cost matched local calculation.
